hardware_substitution: spec called for 8xH100 JP; JP and NE-1 8-GPU all SKUs were dry for ~4 hours; used 4xH100 NE-1 with doubled wallclock (1200s vs 600s) as step-matched substitute
gptq_fail_reason: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'brotli' at serialize()->_compress(). Training, pre-quant post-EMA val eval, and GPTQ quant all completed successfully; only the brotli compression in serialize() crashed. Same failure mode as spec 020b on NE-1.

config_changes_from_spec.MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS: 1200 (doubled from default 600 to match total GPU-seconds of 8xH100 run)
config_changes_from_spec.ENABLE_LOOPING_AT: 0.35 (spec originally listed 0.17; corrected by user during launch to the code default)

post_training.gptq_completed: blocks int6, tok_emb int7 all quantized (see train.log); only brotli compression in serialize failed

interpretation_summary: Pre-quant post-EMA val_bpb on 4xH100 matched 8xH100 baseline family (0.00032 behind 019, 0.00173 behind 008). Hypothesis (buffer-alpha + earlier loop activation 0.35 vs 0.45) not confirmed as a net improvement given the batch-size tax of 4xH100 vs 8xH100 (~0.001-0.002 bpb). Needs 8xH100 rerun to isolate the buffer-alpha + early-loop effect from hardware.
